title: Olivia Samuel 20 x Baby Shower Party Invites - Teddy Bear Design - Ready to Write with Envelopes. Designed and Printed in the UK
features: TEDDY BABY SHOWER PARTY INVITES ⭐ Pack of 20 high quality baby shower invitations in a neutral teddy design ⭐ A6 Size (105mm x 148mm) ⭐ Professionally printed both sides ⭐ Supplied with white envelopes
EXTRA THICK CARDSTOCK ⭐ 300gsm triple coated cardstock with a matt reverse for ease of writing
SIZE ⭐These invitation cards measure 105 x 148mm (A6 Size) and come with C6 Lick and Seal Envelopes
UK MANUFACTURED ⭐ Printed in our Hampshire factory
ECO FRIENDLY ⭐ Our factory runs on 100% renewable energy. Our cardstock is sustainably sourced. Both the card and envelope are fully recyclable.
description: A pack of 20 high quality baby shower party invitation cards and envelopes. Part of the Teddy Bear Baby Shower theme from Olivia Samuel. The A6 cards are ready for you to write your party details on the back. Printed and packaged in the UK by Olivia Samuel.
